description: Style NoteA sequined brown bag from baggit with metallic chain which is guaranteed to spruce up a simple ethnic outfit and add jazz to a western outfit. This bag can be carried as a sling bag or the chain can be hidden inside the main compartment and the bag can be carried as a wrist bag as well.Product DetailsBrown sling bagOne long metallic chain strapFlap with beaded, metallic and sequined detail and a concealed magnetic buttonOne main compartment with a drawstring closure that can be adjusted from both sidesTwo open pockets on one side and one zippered internal pocket with on the other side inside the main compartmentMaterial and CareVelvety blended fabric and syntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth when requiredSizeHeight: 15 cmWidth: 19 cmDepth: 10 cm
